name: LOKI | Thor (2011)
description:
४• “ 𝙇𝙊𝙆𝙄 | 𝙏𝙝𝙤𝙧 (2011) ” •४

➵ An open scenario bot featuring Loki from Thor film. The first message has been intentionally left blank, giving you complete freedom to write any plot you desire. The bot will then adapt and respond to your narrative.

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴛᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ. ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪꜱɪɴɢ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴏꜱᴛɪɴɢ ɪᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀɪ ᴘʟᴀᴛꜰᴏʀᴍꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ ᴍʏ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʙᴇ ᴀ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏꜰ ᴊ.ᴀɪ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴜɴɪᴛʏ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇʟɪɴᴇꜱ (ꜱᴇᴄ. 2.8).

✍︎|𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

  • Hey, I'm back! I'm finally getting around to making Loki scenario bots with all his different eras. It's something I definitely should have started sooner lololols.

  • Loki from the first Thor film, done! Next will be: Loki from The Avengers, Thor: The Dark World, Thor: Ragnarok, Avengers: Infinity War, Avengers: Endgame, Loki series 1 & 2. If you have suggestions, let me know in the comments!

  • My profile looks shitty and the images are gone ;-; I'll fix it when I have the time.

▸|ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛs: Photo from Pinterest. Edited by me.
